description_long: This is a rectangular, open-top picnic basket with a woven texture that mimics natural wicker or rattan. The basket features two oval-shaped cutout handles on opposite sides, allowing for easy carrying. Its surface is uneven and slightly rough, with a hand-crafted appearance and visible weave patterns throughout. The coloration is a mix of earthy browns and muted grays, giving it a rustic and natural look. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, suitable for holding food, utensils, or other picnic items. There are no visible lids, closures, or decorative embellishments beyond the woven pattern.
description: A rectangular, woven picnic basket with cutout handles and a rustic, earthy finish. The open-top design and textured weave give it a hand-crafted, natural appearance.
description_view_0: This view highlights one of the short sides with two oval cutout handles and shows the basket's depth and interior.
description_view_1: This side view displays the long, woven exterior wall and the open top, emphasizing the basket's rectangular shape.
description_view_2: This angle again shows the short side with cutout handles, offering a clear look at the basket's interior and weave pattern.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the opposite long side, with the open top and subtle color variations in the woven texture.
attribute_handle_type: Two fixed oval cutout handles integrated into the short sides of the basket.
attribute_weave_pattern: Plain, open weave with visible gaps and a slightly irregular, hand-crafted appearance.
